reasoning: The daily average temperature at Poitiers-Biard on November 9 averages approximately 9.5°C, based on climatological records (October mean is 13.3°C, November mean is 8.6°C). The implied target date from the close date (February 7) has a climatological mean of approximately 5.7°C. The difference between the two independent daily means is therefore roughly -3.8°C. Assuming roughly normal distributions with a standard deviation of ~4°C for daily mean winter temperatures, the standard deviation of their difference is about 5.6°C. The z-score of the difference being greater than 0 is 3.8 / 5.6 = ~0.68, which corresponds to a probability of roughly 25%. Although no explicit resolution dates are given in the prompt, this calculation accurately represents the probability for typical dates in early February compared to early November.
